description: Discover Unity SerializedProperty propertyPath values for a View Binding target without writing data. Provide either bindingId from bindings.json or a concrete target, then filter by fieldName, fieldType, or query. Returns matching property paths with reflected field type metadata.

viewId.description: View id containing bindings.json, for example material-inspector.

bindingId.description: Optional binding id from bindings.json. Its target object is used as the discovery root.

target.description: Concrete binding target without propertyPath. Fields: kind, path, scenePath, objectPath, componentType, componentIndex.

query.description: Optional text search across property path, display name, field type, and assembly.

fieldName.description: Optional field name or display name to find, for example speed or settings.

fieldType.description: Optional C# field type name or full name. Base classes and interfaces match when Unity can reflect the type.

maxDepth.description: Optional traversal depth cap. Defaults to 8.

maxResults.description: Optional result cap. Defaults to 100, maximum 500.
